user_query:
I need a structured summary and action-item verification for our most recent nanodevice team meeting. Please work entirely within this workspace and use only the files provided under input/.

Requirements:
- Inspect all .txt meeting notes in input/notes/. Identify the latest meeting by reading the Date field in each file (do not rely on filenames).
- From the latest meeting, extract: participants, agenda topics, decisions, and action items (capture owner and any explicit due date). Also capture any clear leakage/simulation notes as highlights.
- Include a context.previous_decisions section populated from the immediately prior meeting’s Decisions list and that meeting’s date.
- For each action item in the latest meeting that references a configuration key or code artifact, verify its current status by inspecting the corresponding files under input/:
  • If an item asks to change a config value, compare the requested value to the current one in input/config/*. Specifically, check anneal_temp_c in input/config/deposition.yaml and nanowire_pitch_nm in input/config/sim_config.json.
  • If an item asks to "confirm that estimate_tunneling_current docstring mentions WKB", open input/models/quantum_tunnel_model.py and check the docstring of estimate_tunneling_current for the substring "WKB".
- For each such item, set verification_status to "satisfied" if the current code/config already matches the requested state, else "pending". Include a short verification_evidence note with the observed value or short excerpt that supports the status.

Deliverables (write these to the workspace):
- Create a directory output/meeting_<YYYY-MM-DD>/ where <YYYY-MM-DD> is the latest meeting date parsed from the notes.
- Write output/meeting_<YYYY-MM-DD>/summary.json containing: meeting_date, participants (array), agenda (array), decisions (array), action_items (array of objects with fields: description, owner, due_date or null, references (array of file paths or symbols), verification_status, verification_evidence), context (object with previous_meeting_date and previous_decisions array), and notes_highlights (array).
- Write output/meeting_<YYYY-MM-DD>/action_items.csv with columns: owner, description, due_date, verification_status.

Do not modify any input files and do not fetch any external resources. All file paths are relative to the workspace directory.
